title: Toast messages truncate — grow height to fit full message
description: Status-bar toasts clamp to 2 lines (MpiToast.css `-webkit-line-clamp: 2`) so longer messages (e.g. the missing-LoRA warning) are cut off mid-sentence. Toast should grow in height to show the full message (with a sane max-height + scroll only for extreme lengths). Affects all ui:info/warning/success toasts via StatusBar.notify.
